beginner.question: What is CSS scroll snap?
beginner.answer: CSS scroll snap controls the scrolling behavior of a scroll container, forcing it to snap to specific positions, making scrolling more precise.

beginner.question: What does scroll-snap-type do?
beginner.answer: scroll-snap-type defines the direction and strictness of snap points on a scroll container, like x mandatory or y proximity.

beginner.question: What does scroll-snap-align control?
beginner.answer: scroll-snap-align sets where an element snaps to within the scroll container, using values like start, center, or end.

beginner.question: What is scroll-snap-stop?
beginner.answer: scroll-snap-stop controls whether the scroll container can pass over snap positions; normal allows passing, always forces stopping at each snap point.

beginner.question: How do you enable horizontal scroll snapping?
beginner.answer: Set scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; on the container, and scroll-snap-align: start; on each horizontal child item.

beginner.question: What does scroll-margin do in scroll snap?
beginner.answer: scroll-margin adds spacing around a snap target, offsetting the snap position from the edge of the scroll container.

beginner.question: How do you create a vertical scroll snap gallery?
beginner.answer: Set scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; on the vertical scroll container, and scroll-snap-align: start; on each child section.

beginner.question: What is the difference between mandatory and proximity?
beginner.answer: mandatory always snaps to the nearest snap point; proximity snaps only when the scroll position is close enough to a snap point.

beginner.question: Can scroll-snap work with both axes simultaneously?
beginner.answer: Yes, use scroll-snap-type: both mandatory; to snap on both horizontal and vertical axes.

beginner.question: Does scroll snap work on touch devices?
beginner.answer: Yes, scroll snap works on touch, trackpad, and mouse wheel scrolling across modern browsers.

intermediate.question: How do scroll-snap-align values (start, center, end) affect snapping?
intermediate.answer: start aligns the child's start edge with the container's snap position; center centers the child; end aligns the end edge.

intermediate.question: How do you use scroll-snap-type: inline for writing-mode-aware snapping?
intermediate.answer: scroll-snap-type: inline respects the writing direction, snapping on the logical inline axis (horizontal in LTR, vertical in vertical writing).

intermediate.question: How does scroll-margin differ from scroll-padding?
intermediate.answer: scroll-margin is set on snap children and offsets the snap position outward; scroll-padding is set on the container and offsets inward.

intermediate.question: How do you create a carousel with CSS scroll snap?
intermediate.answer: Use overflow-x: auto; scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; on the carousel container with children having scroll-snap-align: start;.

intermediate.question: How do you prevent scroll snap from skipping items on fast scroll?
intermediate.answer: Set scroll-snap-stop: always; on snap children to force the browser to stop at each snap point even during fast scrolling.

intermediate.question: How does scroll snap interact with overflow: hidden?
intermediate.answer: overflow: hidden disables scrolling entirely, preventing scroll snap from functioning; use overflow: auto or overflow: scroll instead.

intermediate.question: Can scroll snap work with scroll-driven animations?
intermediate.answer: Yes, scroll snap positions can trigger scroll-driven animations, but the snap behavior may interrupt smooth animation timelines.

intermediate.question: How do you create a full-screen page scroll snap effect?
intermediate.answer: Set scroll-snap-type: y mandatory; on html or body, and scroll-snap-align: start; on each full-viewport-height section.

intermediate.question: How does scroll snap behave with dynamic content added via JavaScript?
intermediate.answer: New items within a snap container are immediately interactive; the browser recalculates snap positions after layout.

intermediate.question: How do you style scroll snap indicators (dots or progress)?
intermediate.answer: Use IntersectionObserver with JavaScript to detect active snap children and update indicator states accordingly.

advanced.question: How does scroll snap interact with CSS scroll-behavior: smooth?
advanced.answer: scroll-snap overrides smooth scroll behavior to enforce snap points; smooth scrolling applies between snap positions within the same snap region.

advanced.question: How do you handle scroll snap in nested scroll containers?
advanced.answer: Each scroll container manages its own snap points; nested snap containers can conflict, so avoid nesting snap containers on the same axis.

advanced.question: How does scroll snap affect accessibility (keyboard scrolling)?
advanced.answer: Scroll snap works with keyboard scroll (arrow keys, space, page up/down); ensure all content is reachable despite snap constraints.

advanced.question: How do you debug scroll snap issues in DevTools?
advanced.answer: Chrome DevTools highlights snap containers and snap child positions in the Elements panel when scroll snap is detected.

advanced.question: How does scroll snap interact with virtual scrolling libraries?
advanced.answer: Virtual scrolling replaces DOM elements dynamically, which can break snap positions; scroll snap works best with static or stable DOM content.

advanced.question: How do you combine scroll snap with CSS animations for micro-interactions?
advanced.answer: Use the ScrollTimeline API or IntersectionObserver to trigger animations when an element becomes the active snap target.

advanced.question: How do you create a horizontal scroll snap with vertical overflow for multi-line items?
advanced.answer: Use scroll-snap-type: both mandatory; with flex-wrap for items that fill multiple rows within horizontal scrolling.

advanced.question: How does scroll snap behave with transform: scale on children?
advanced.answer: Scroll snap uses the element's layout box, not its transformed box; scaled children snap based on original dimensions, potentially misaligning.

advanced.question: How do you implement scroll snap on an element with dynamic height?
advanced.answer: Scroll snap calculates snap positions after layout; dynamic height changes re-trigger snap recalculation, which may cause unexpected jumps.

advanced.question: How does scroll-snap-type: both mandatory work with diagonal scrolling?
advanced.answer: both mandatory snaps to the nearest 2D grid point; the scroll container must have content arranged in both axes for effective diagonal snapping.
